summary.en: Projectile toys supplied in Australia should be assessed against AS/NZS ISO 8124-1 mechanical and physical safety provisions, including projectile design, stored energy, impact hazards, small parts, and warnings where applicable. Products that include darts, suction cups, balls, arrows, or other launched parts require special attention because detached tips or undersized projectiles may create choking, eye, or impact hazards.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚供应的弹射玩具应按AS/NZS ISO 8124-1机械及物理安全条款评估，包括弹射物设计、储能、冲击危害、小零件以及适用警示。含飞镖、吸盘、球、箭或其他发射部件的产品需要特别关注，因为脱落端头或尺寸不足的弹射物可能造成窒息、眼部或冲击伤害。
summary.zht: 在澳洲供應的彈射玩具應按AS/NZS ISO 8124-1機械及物理安全條款評估，包括彈射物設計、儲能、衝擊危害、小零件以及適用警示。含飛鏢、吸盤、球、箭或其他發射部件的產品需要特別關注，因為脫落端頭或尺寸不足的彈射物可能造成窒息、眼部或衝擊傷害。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS ISO 8124.1 — Safety of toys — Safety aspects related to mechanical and physical properties
Australian Consumer Law — general product safety obligations and mandatory standards where applicable

summary.en: GB 6675.2 contains mechanical and physical requirements for projectile toys and similar hazards. A Chinese test pass can indicate technical alignment, but Australian suppliers still need evidence that the specific projectile configuration, packaging claims, and warnings were assessed for Australian supply.
summary.zh: GB 6675.2包含弹射玩具及类似危害的机械和物理要求。中国测试通过可提示技术对齐，但澳大利亚供应商仍需证明具体弹射配置、包装声明和警示已针对澳大利亚供货进行评估。
summary.zht: GB 6675.2包含彈射玩具及類似危害的機械和物理要求。中國測試通過可提示技術對齊，但澳洲供應商仍需證明具體彈射配置、包裝聲明和警示已針對澳洲供貨進行評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 6675.2-2014 — Safety of toys — Mechanical and physical properties

gap.en: Check projectile dimensions after abuse testing, tip retention, impact-energy results, and any age-warning language. Do not assume a projectile toy suitable for an older child can be supplied without controls if the product presentation may attract children under 36 months.
gap.zh: 应检查滥用测试后的弹射物尺寸、端头保持力、冲击能量结果及任何年龄警示语言。若产品展示可能吸引36个月以下儿童，不应假定面向较大儿童的弹射玩具可不加控制地供应。
gap.zht: 應檢查濫用測試後的彈射物尺寸、端頭保持力、衝擊能量結果及任何年齡警示語言。若產品展示可能吸引36個月以下兒童，不應假定面向較大兒童的彈射玩具可不加控制地供應。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the toy falls within an Australian mandatory standard; otherwise general Australian Consumer Law safety obligations still apply
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for covered China toy categories — GB 6675.2 / CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Projectile toy evidence should be product-specific. Confirm AS/NZS ISO 8124.1 alignment for launched parts, impact hazards, detachable tips, and warnings before Australian supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】弹射玩具证据应针对具体产品。进入澳大利亚供货前，应确认发射部件、冲击危害、可脱落端头和警示均与AS/NZS ISO 8124.1对齐。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】彈射玩具證據應針對具體產品。進入澳洲供貨前，應確認發射部件、衝擊危害、可脫落端頭和警示均與AS/NZS ISO 8124.1對齊。
